facebook.content: Hey friends, I want to remind you to set aside time to worship in spirit and truth. At IFM, we believe that our gatherings are a sacred space to connect with God and with one another. Join us in-person on the FIRST SATURDAY OF THE MONTH at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI, or tune in daily online for our Hour of Power, Monday - Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live. Let's come together, lift our voices, and let the presence of the Lord fall upon us. Who's joining us this month?
facebook.fullPost:
Hey friends, I want to remind you to set aside time to worship in spirit and truth. At IFM, we believe that our gatherings are a sacred space to connect with God and with one another. Join us in-person on the FIRST SATURDAY OF THE MONTH at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI, or tune in daily online for our Hour of Power, Monday - Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live. Let's come together, lift our voices, and let the presence of the Lord fall upon us. Who's joining us this month?

Join us for worship
https://increasingfaith.net/visit.html

#JesusIsLord #KingdomOfGod #KingdomCitizen
facebook.pullQuote: Let the presence of the Lord fall upon us.

instagram.content:
Worship Time is Coming!

Saddle up, Church! It's that time again to gather in His presence and let the fire fall!

Join us this First Saturday at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI for our in-person worship gathering.

Or, if you can't make it in person, join us daily online for our Hour of Power from Monday to Friday at 8:15 AM on Facebook Live.
